description: 情绪编排引擎集成版 — 跨镜头情绪弧线驱动
generation_method: pkg/emotionengine 全局情绪弧线分析 + pkg/shotgrammar 规则匹配 + EmotionToMotionStyle 驱动

design_notes: 经典五幕弧线：铺垫(1-2) → 上升(3) → 高潮(4) → 下降(5-6) → 收束(7)
第4→5场是全剧最关键的情绪转折：愤怒爆发→悲伤崩溃，用SilenceWindow制造'呼吸感'
BGM编排：ambient → building → PEAK → SILENT → fadeout → ambient → gentle resolution
时长编排：稍慢(setup) → 加速(rising) → 快节奏(climax) → 放慢+留白(falling) → 最慢(resolution)

scenes.title: 沉默的等待

arc_context.position: 全剧开篇，铺垫氛围，为后续情绪上升建立基线
arc_context.relation_to_next: 平静→不安：微妙的不安感开始渗透，需要在平静中埋下伏笔

scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 平静[0] — serene stillness with gentle ambient motion
scenes.motion_hint: macro detail shot with ambient motion (rain drops, dust particles)
scenes.motion_override: slow deliberate camera movement establishing mood
scenes.action: 林晓坐在沙发上，手里握着一杯已经凉了的咖啡，目光空洞地看着前方
scenes.result: 咖啡杯表面微微泛起涟漪，映出电视的冷光——暗示主人公内心的微澜
scenes.atmosphere: 深夜客厅，只有电视的微光，空气中弥漫着凉透的咖啡气息
scenes.bgm_prompt: soft intro: ambient pads, gentle nature sounds — 极低音量的环境音，远处偶尔传来的城市白噪音，营造深夜独处的空旷感
scenes.sound_effect: 时钟滴答声，电视低频杂音
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a cold coffee cup on a dark living room table, TV light reflecting on the liquid surface creating subtle ripples, shallow depth of field, muted cool tones with warm TV glow, melancholic stillness, cinematic lighting from screen only, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), eye-level angle, locked-off static camera | [Motion] serene stillness with gentle ambient motion | [Emotion-Engine] slow deliberate camera movement establishing mood | [Action] coffee surface with micro-ripples from subtle hand tremor, TV light flickering across liquid | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 只有电视微光的昏暗空间 | [Pacing] 0.5x-0.8x speed, lingering, setup rhythm | [BGM-Cue] soft intro: ambient pads, gentle nature sounds | [Audio] SFX: 时钟滴答声，电视低频杂音 | [Result] 咖啡杯表面微微泛起涟漪，映出电视的冷光 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从中景固定→ECU环境特写，用微观细节建立氛围。vs版本B：新增arc_context定位为setup，时长从5s→6s（×1.1铺垫节奏），BGM从无→ambient环境音。Emotion-Engine叠加了'slow deliberate camera movement establishing mood'，强化开篇的沉浸感。

scenes.title: 电话响起

arc_context.position: 铺垫尾声，事件触发点——从静态转为动态的临界时刻
arc_context.relation_to_next: 不安→紧张：电话响起是催化剂，下一场进入rising阶段

scenes.matched_rule: turning_point[0] — 关键道具/表情特写
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 紧张[1] — steady with subtle unease in framing
scenes.motion_hint: sharp focus on key detail with shallow depth of field
scenes.motion_override: slow deliberate camera movement establishing mood
scenes.action: 手机突然震动，屏幕亮起'陈默'两个字，林晓的手微微颤抖
scenes.result: 手机屏幕在黑暗中骤然亮起，来电显示刺眼清晰，手指在屏幕边缘微微颤抖
scenes.atmosphere: 突然的震动打破寂静，光线从暖色骤变为手机屏幕的冷白光
scenes.bgm_prompt: soft intro: suspenseful strings, low bass pulse — 极低频的弦乐颤音开始渗入，像心跳一样的bass pulse，预示不安
scenes.sound_effect: 手机震动声（由远及近），玻璃桌面共振
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a smartphone screen lighting up in darkness showing caller name '陈默', fingers trembling at screen edge, sharp focus on screen with blurred dark background, cold white phone light cutting through warm TV ambience, high contrast, shallow depth of field, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), eye-level angle, locked-off static camera | [Motion] steady with subtle unease in framing | [Emotion-Engine] slow deliberate camera movement establishing mood | [Action] phone screen suddenly illuminates in darkness, vibration causes micro-movement, fingers at edge tremble | [Environment] 客厅内·茶几, 深夜, 光线从暖色骤变为冷白光 | [Pacing] rapid acceleration, snap movement, setup rhythm | [BGM-Cue] soft intro: suspenseful strings, low bass pulse | [Audio] SFX: 手机震动声由远及近，玻璃桌面共振 | [Result] 手机屏幕在黑暗中骤然亮起，来电显示刺眼清晰 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：近景俯视推镜→ECU固定特写+smash_cut。vs版本B：基本一致，新增BGM编排——suspenseful strings的低频颤音从这里开始渗入，与第1场的ambient形成对比。arc_context标注这是'事件触发点'，smash_cut从上一场的dissolve骤然切入制造惊吓感，这个转场选择现在有了全局弧线的支撑。

scenes.title: 犹豫接听

arc_context.position: 上升阶段——情绪开始加速攀升，为高潮蓄力
arc_context.relation_to_next: 紧张→愤怒：接听电话是导火索，下一场直接引爆climax

scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 紧张[2] — tense handheld with slight tremor
scenes.motion_hint: slow creep in during emotional dialogue
scenes.motion_override: gradually increasing camera energy and urgency
scenes.action: 林晓深吸一口气，闭上眼睛，最终按下了接听键
scenes.result: 从面部中景缓缓推进到眼部特写，捕捉闭眼→睁眼→决定的微表情变化
scenes.atmosphere: 电话铃声持续响着，空气凝固，时间仿佛被拉长
scenes.bgm_prompt: building intensity: suspenseful strings, low bass pulse, gradually layering — 弦乐层次逐渐叠加，bass pulse加速，像心跳越来越快，紧张感持续攀升
scenes.sound_effect: 持续的手机铃声，深呼吸声，接听键按下的轻微咔嗒
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a young woman's face in dim TV light, eyes closed in hesitation, phone held near ear, tense expression with furrowed brow, shallow depth of field focusing on eyelashes and lips, cool blue-grey tones with phone screen glow on cheek, emotional tension visible in jaw muscles, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] close-up (CU), eye-level angle, dolly push in toward subject, with deliberate emphasis | [Motion] tense handheld with slight tremor | [Emotion-Engine] gradually increasing camera energy and urgency | [Action] deep breath, eyes close then slowly open, finger presses answer button, with visible 紧张 | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 空气凝固时间被拉长 | [Pacing] 1.2x-1.5x speed, rising rhythm — camera energy accelerating | [BGM-Cue] building intensity: suspenseful strings, gradually layering | [Audio] SFX: 持续铃声，深呼吸声，接听键咔嗒 | [Result] 从面部缓缓推进到眼部特写，捕捉闭眼→睁眼→决定的微表情 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：特写固定→CU慢推+handheld tremor。vs版本B：镜头选择一致，核心差异在Emotion-Engine叠加了'gradually increasing camera energy and urgency'——这不是单场决定的，而是引擎识别到rising阶段后自动注入的加速指令。BGM从ambient→building，弦乐层次叠加与摄影机能量同步上升。pacing标注了'rising rhythm'，让视频生成模型知道这是在蓄力。

scenes.title: 争吵爆发

arc_context.position: 全剧情绪高峰——愤怒爆发，所有蓄积的情绪在此释放
arc_context.relation_to_next: 愤怒→悲伤：高峰后的骤然坠落，下一场是SilenceWindow静默留白

scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 愤怒[3] — aggressive push in with sharp focus, explosive energy
scenes.motion_hint: intense push in to eyes/face capturing raw emotion
scenes.motion_override: maximum camera intensity, dramatic movement; intimate close-up with emotional weight, lingering on facial micro-expressions
scenes.action: 林晓猛地站起来，声音越来越大，眼眶泛红，手紧紧攥着手机
scenes.result: 怼脸大特写——从下方仰视，捕捉泛红的眼眶、咬紧的牙关、颤抖的嘴唇
scenes.dialogue: 你现在才想起来打电话？三个月了！
scenes.atmosphere: 情绪急剧升温，画面从冷色调骤变为暖红色调，空间压迫感极强
scenes.bgm_prompt: PEAK: aggressive percussion, distorted bass, full orchestration, maximum energy — 打击乐猛烈介入，失真bass震动，弦乐全编制爆发，音量推到最大，与怒吼同步达到顶点
scenes.sound_effect: 站起时沙发弹簧声，手机外壳被攥紧的吱嘎声
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up from low angle looking up at a woman's face in fury, red-rimmed eyes glistening with unshed tears, clenched jaw, lips trembling with rage, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with warm red undertones, phone gripped white-knuckled at edge of frame, intense emotional peak, shallow depth of field on eyes, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), low angle (looking up), dolly push in toward subject, with dramatic intensity | [Motion] aggressive push in with sharp focus, explosive energy | [Emotion-Engine] maximum camera intensity, dramatic movement; intimate close-up with emotional weight, lingering on facial micro-expressions | [Action] 猛地站起，声音越来越大，眼眶泛红，手紧紧攥着手机, with intense 愤怒 | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 画面从冷色调骤变为暖红色调 | [Pacing] rapid acceleration, snap movement, CLIMAX — peak intensity burst | [BGM-Cue] PEAK: aggressive percussion, distorted bass, full orchestration, maximum energy | [Audio] SFX: 沙发弹簧声，手机外壳攥紧吱嘎声 | [Result] 怼脸大特写——仰视捕捉泛红眼眶、咬紧牙关、颤抖嘴唇 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：中景跟镜→ECU低角度急推（怼脸大镜头）。vs版本B：镜头选择一致，核心差异：1) Emotion-Engine双重叠加——'maximum camera intensity'+'intimate close-up lingering on micro-expressions'，引擎识别到climax+ECU后自动触发怼脸增强；2) 时长从5s→4s（×0.7 climax快节奏），爆发要快不要拖；3) BGM达到PEAK——打击乐+失真bass+全编制弦乐，与画面情绪完全同步；4) pacing标注'CLIMAX — peak intensity burst'，明确告诉视频模型这是全剧最高能量点。

scenes.title: 情绪崩溃

arc_context.position: 高潮后的骤然坠落——SilenceWindow静默留白，全剧最重要的情绪转折
arc_context.relation_to_next: 悲伤→坚定：从谷底开始回升，下一场是情绪收束的转折

scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 悲伤[3] — lingering close-up with slow fade, heavy atmosphere
scenes.motion_hint: slow pull out leaving character isolated in frame
scenes.motion_override: camera gradually settling, releasing tension; [SILENCE WINDOW] dramatic pause — hold breath moment, let the emptiness speak
scenes.action: 林晓的声音突然哽咽，她慢慢蹲下来，靠着沙发，泪水无声地流下
scenes.result: 俯视拉远——女人蜷缩在沙发旁的身影越来越小，被昏暗的客厅吞没。前2秒完全静默，只有呼吸声
scenes.atmosphere: 从上一场的暴烈骤然转为死寂，只有抽泣声在空旷的客厅回荡
scenes.bgm_prompt: SILENT → fadeout: 前2秒完全静默（SilenceWindow），没有任何音乐，只有呼吸和抽泣。第3秒起，极轻的melancholic piano单音开始渗入，像雨滴落在空房间里，soft strings在远处若隐若现
scenes.sound_effect: 抽泣声，身体滑落靠在沙发上的摩擦声，静默中放大的呼吸声
scenes.image_prompt: High angle medium shot looking down at a woman crumpled beside a sofa in a dark living room, tears streaming silently, body curled inward, isolated in vast dark space, overhead perspective emphasizing vulnerability and loneliness, muted desaturated tones, single dim light source from TV, heavy melancholic atmosphere, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] medium shot (MS), high angle (looking down), dolly pull back from subject, with dramatic intensity | [Motion] lingering close-up with slow fade, heavy atmosphere | [Emotion-Engine] camera gradually settling, releasing tension | [Silence] dramatic pause, hold breath moment — 前2秒完全静默，让空虚说话 | [Action] 声音突然哽咽，慢慢蹲下来，靠着沙发，泪水无声地流下, with intense 悲伤 | [Environment] 客厅内·沙发旁, 深夜, 从暴烈骤然转为死寂 | [Pacing] 0.5x-0.8x speed, lingering, falling rhythm — tension releasing slowly | [BGM-Cue] SILENT first 2s → then melancholic piano single notes, like raindrops | [Audio] SFX: 抽泣声，身体滑落摩擦声，静默中放大的呼吸声 | [Result] 俯视拉远——蜷缩身影越来越小，被昏暗客厅吞没 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：近景俯视推镜→中景俯视拉镜。vs版本B：镜头选择一致，核心差异是SilenceWindow——这是版本C最关键的独有能力。引擎识别到这是peakIdx+1（高潮后第一场），自动触发静默留白：1) BGM从PEAK骤然切为SILENT，前2秒完全无音乐，只有呼吸和抽泣——这个'呼吸感'是版本B做不到的；2) motion_override叠加了'dramatic pause, hold breath moment, let the emptiness speak'；3) 时长从7s→9s（×1.15 falling节奏+留白加成），给观众消化情绪的时间；4) 第3秒起piano单音渗入，像雨滴一样，与上一场的打击乐爆发形成极端对比。这个从PEAK→SILENT的断崖式落差，是跨镜头编排才能实现的。

scenes.title: 决断挂断

arc_context.position: 下降阶段尾声——从悲伤谷底回升，情绪开始收束
arc_context.relation_to_next: 坚定→释然：决断完成后进入resolution，最终释然

scenes.matched_rule: turning_point[0] — 关键道具/表情特写
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 坚定[2] — strong low angle with steady resolve
scenes.motion_hint: sharp focus on key detail with shallow depth of field
scenes.motion_override: camera gradually settling, releasing tension — from grief to resolve, steady unwavering frame
scenes.action: 林晓擦了擦眼泪，深呼吸，声音恢复平静，果断挂断电话
scenes.result: 低角度仰视特写——擦干泪痕的脸庞，眼神从迷茫变为坚定，手指果断按下挂断
scenes.atmosphere: 情绪从崩溃中收束，空气开始流动，画面色调从冷灰转为中性暖调
scenes.bgm_prompt: winding down: powerful orchestral, steady rhythm, instruments dropping out — 弦乐从悲伤的piano过渡到坚定的orchestral，节奏变得稳定有力，但乐器逐渐减少，只留下大提琴的低沉长音，像心跳恢复平静
scenes.sound_effect: 挂断电话的嘟嘟声，随后的寂静
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up from low angle of a woman's face with dried tear tracks, eyes now clear and determined, jaw set with resolve, finger pressing end-call button in foreground with shallow depth of field, transitioning from cold grey to neutral warm tones, strength emerging from vulnerability, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), low angle (looking up), locked-off static camera, with deliberate emphasis | [Motion] strong low angle with steady resolve | [Emotion-Engine] camera gradually settling, releasing tension — from grief to resolve, steady unwavering frame | [Action] 擦干眼泪，深呼吸，声音恢复平静，果断挂断电话, with visible 坚定 | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 色调从冷灰转为中性暖调 | [Pacing] 1x natural speed, falling rhythm — tension resolving | [BGM-Cue] winding down: orchestral steady rhythm, instruments dropping out, cello sustain | [Audio] SFX: 挂断电话嘟嘟声，随后寂静 | [Result] 低角度仰视——眼神从迷茫变为坚定，手指果断按下挂断 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：特写平视固定→ECU低角度固定。vs版本B：镜头选择一致，核心差异：1) 转场从smash_cut改为dissolve——引擎识别到falling阶段不再需要冲击性转场，用dissolve柔化从悲伤到坚定的过渡；2) BGM编排从无→winding down orchestral，大提琴长音承接上一场的piano，形成音乐层面的情绪过渡；3) motion_override加入了'from grief to resolve'的叙事指令，让摄影机行为有了前后文关系；4) 时长从5s→6s（×1.15 falling节奏），给'决断'这个动作足够的仪式感。

scenes.title: 窗前释然

arc_context.position: 全剧收束——情绪回归平静，但不是回到起点，而是经历风暴后的新平衡

scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 平静[0] — serene stillness with gentle ambient motion
scenes.motion_hint: slow pull out and rise as character diminishes
scenes.motion_override: calm steady camera, contemplative stillness; extended take with breathing room, no rush
scenes.action: 林晓走到窗前，推开窗户，望着远处的灯火，嘴角微微上扬
scenes.result: 摄影机缓缓上升后拉——从窗前的女人背影，逐渐拉远到城市夜景全貌，人物融入灯火，最终fade to black
scenes.atmosphere: 夜风吹过，窗帘轻轻飘动，城市灯火温暖而遥远
scenes.bgm_prompt: gentle resolution: resolving chord progression, warm tones, minimal arrangement — 大提琴长音渐弱，钢琴弹出解决和弦（从小调到大调的微妙转换），最后只剩环境音和远处城市的低频白噪音，音乐完全消失在夜风中
scenes.sound_effect: 窗户推开声，夜风声，远处城市的低频环境音，窗帘飘动的轻微声响
scenes.image_prompt: Medium shot from slightly high angle of a woman standing at an open window, back to camera, city lights stretching to horizon, curtains gently billowing in night breeze, warm amber city glow contrasting cool interior, peaceful silhouette against urban landscape, sense of release and new beginning, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] medium shot (MS), high angle (looking down), dolly pull back from subject, with gentle easing | [Motion] serene stillness with gentle ambient motion | [Emotion-Engine] calm steady camera, contemplative stillness; extended take with breathing room, no rush | [Action] 走到窗前，推开窗户，望着远处灯火，嘴角微微上扬 | [Environment] 客厅内·窗前, 深夜, 夜风吹过窗帘轻轻飘动 | [Pacing] 0.5x-0.8x speed, lingering, RESOLUTION — final breathing space | [BGM-Cue] gentle resolution: resolving chord progression, warm tones → fade to silence | [Audio] SFX: 窗户推开声，夜风声，远处城市低频环境音 | [Result] 摄影机缓缓上升后拉——从窗前背影拉远到城市夜景全貌，fade to black | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：远景平视拉镜→中景高角度上升拉镜。vs版本B：镜头选择一致，核心差异：1) 时长从6s→8s（×1.3 resolution最慢节奏），这是全剧最长的镜头——引擎自动给resolution阶段最大的留白空间；2) 转场从fade升级为fade_to_black，明确的终场信号；3) BGM编排完成了从PEAK→SILENT→piano→cello→resolving chord→fade to silence的完整弧线，最后音乐消失在夜风中；4) Emotion-Engine叠加了'extended take with breathing room, no rush'——引擎识别到duration≥5的resolution场景后自动触发长镜头留白；5) 整体弧线在此闭合：从第1场的ambient环境音开始，经历building→PEAK→SILENT→winding down，最终回到环境音+寂静，但这个寂静不是空洞的，而是经历过风暴后的平静。

vs_version_a_improvements: 从无规则到有规则：每场镜头选择基于 ShotRule + EmotionProfile，而非随意指定
从平铺拼接到结构化 Motion Prompt：[Camera][Motion][Emotion-Engine][Action][Pacing][BGM-Cue] 多层结构
从无情绪利用到情绪驱动：emotion_intensity 直接影响景别、运镜、角度、节奏、时长
从无转场到叙事转场：dissolve/smash_cut/fade_to_black 按情绪关系编排
从固定时长到动态时长：setup×1.1 / rising×0.95 / climax×0.7 / falling×1.15 / resolution×1.3
怼脸大镜头（第4场ECU低角度急推）和长镜头留白（第5场9秒+第7场8秒）
vs_version_b_improvements: 跨镜头情绪弧线编排：不再是每场独立生成，而是先分析全局再逐场编排
SilenceWindow静默留白（第5场）：PEAK→SILENT的断崖式落差，前2秒完全无音乐——这是版本B做不到的
BGM全局编排：7场戏的音乐形成完整弧线（ambient→suspenseful→building→PEAK→SILENT→winding down→resolution→silence），而非每场独立
时长动态调整：引擎根据rhythm_role自动调整（总时长从38s→42s，climax压缩+resolution拉长）
转场前后文关系：第5场从smash_cut改为dissolve（falling不需要冲击），第7场从fade改为fade_to_black（终场信号）
Emotion-Engine叠加层：每场video_prompt多了[Emotion-Engine]指令，描述该场在全局弧线中的摄影机行为
arc_context字段：每场标注rhythm_role + position + relation_to_next，让下游（视频生成/剪辑）理解全局意图
key_differentiators: 第4→5场的PEAK→SILENT转折：版本A无处理，版本B用dissolve过渡，版本C用SilenceWindow制造'呼吸感'——打击乐爆发后骤然寂静，只有呼吸和抽泣，2秒后piano单音渗入
BGM弧线的完整性：版本A/B完全没有BGM，版本C的7场BGM形成了从环境音→紧张弦乐→全编制爆发→静默→钢琴→大提琴→解决和弦→消失在夜风中的完整叙事
时长的叙事意义：版本A/B的时长是静态的，版本C的时长有节奏含义——climax压缩到4秒（爆发要快），resolution拉长到8秒（留白要够）

emotion_utilization.version_c: 驱动全局弧线+单场镜头+BGM+时长+转场
